notes:
Screen Share Polish

  • Minimized view: When you minimize screen share, a small thumbnail appears in the corner of your bubble so you can still see it — click it to expand again.
  • Visible buttons: The minimize and fullscreen buttons on the screen share window are now easy to see on any background.
  • Resize: Drag the corner of the screen share window to make it larger or smaller.
  • Cursors in bubble mode: When watching someone's screen in bubble mode, you now see their cursor movements.
